description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From rotary file products, select the cheapest 25 mm NiTi option with .06 taper priced under $100 and rated at least 4 stars, and add 3 packs to your cart.

target_names: NiTi Value Rotary Files 25 mm .06 Taper

tasks.instruction: Build a starter kit by adding to your cart one apex locator under $600 with rating at least 4.5 stars, two packs of hand files covering sizes 15–40 under $35 each, and two bioceramic sealers priced between $40 and $70 with rating at least 4 stars.

tasks.instruction: Among reciprocating file systems under $200 with rating at least 4 stars, compare the first two results and add the one with more customer reviews to your wishlist.

tasks.instruction: From gutta-percha points compatible with the ProTaper Gold file system, size 30 with .04 taper, priced under $35 and rated at least 4 stars, add 4 boxes of the third cheapest option to your cart.

tasks.instruction: For an endodontic motor with at least a 4-star rating that offers a demo request, open its demo form and submit it with a full name, clinic name, email, phone number, and a preferred demo date on the 15th of next month.
